name: Aunt Bee's Apple Pie (Opie's Favorite)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the butter and cream cheese until at room temperature.
2. Add 2 cups of flour and mix well. Chill the mixture.
3. Roll out half of the dough and place it in a 9-inch pie plate. Set aside the remaining dough for the top crust.
4. In a saucepan, combine the remaining ingredients (sugar, orange juice, honey, cinnamon) and bring to a boil.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie crust.
6. Roll out the remaining dough and place it over the filling.
7. Make slits in the top crust to allow steam to escape.
8. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
